aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic online presence but lacks essential elements for strong AEO readiness, such as structured data, a clear website title, and customer reviews.
quick_wins: Add a descriptive and keyword-rich website title.
Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility.

found: NAP information is present on the website
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has basic NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) information but lacks structured data and additional local signals that could enhance its Google Business Profile.
critical_issues: Missing schema markup for local business.
No customer reviews on Google to boost local search presence.

nap_citations.summary: The NAP information is present on the website but is not consistent or widely cited across other online platforms and directories.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
List the business on relevant local directories and citation sites.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search queries and voice search
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement local business schema and encourage Google reviews
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Enhance online presence through consistent NAP, schema markup, and customer engagement to improve local search authority
